<file>
00001| /* ==================== GLOBAL RESET ==================== */
00002| 
00003| * {
00004|     margin: 0;
00005|     padding: 0;
00006|     box-sizing: border-box;
00007| }
00008| 
00009| :root {
00010|     /* Color Palette - Dark Theme (Default) */
00011|     --bg-primary: #1a2332;
00012|     --bg-secondary: #243447;
00013|     --bg-card: #2a3f5f;
00014|     --text-primary: #ffffff;
00015|     --text-secondary: #b0c4de;
00016|     --accent-teal: #4ecdc4;
00017|     --accent-yellow: #ffd166;
00018|     --accent-pink: #ff6b9d;
00019|     --accent-purple: #c77dff;
00020|     --accent-green: #06ffa5;
00021|     --accent-red: #ff4757;
00022|     --border-color: #3d5a80;
00023| }
00024| 
00025| body {
00026|     font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
00027|     background: var(--bg-primary);
00028|     color: var(--text-primary);
00029|     overflow-x: hidden;
00030|     transition: background 0.5s ease, color 0.5s ease;
00031| }
00032| 
00033| /* Theme Transition Animations */
00034| .app-container,
00035| .sidebar,
00036| .main-content,
00037| .card,
00038| .nav-item,
00039| .theme-section {
00040|     transition: all 0.5s ease;
00041| }
00042| 
00043| button,
00044| .toggle-label,
00045| .action-btn,
00046| .theme-btn {
00047|     transition: all 0.3s ease;
00048| }
00049| 
00050| .chart-container canvas {
00051|     transition: all 0.5s ease;
00052| }
00053| 
00054| /* ==================== APP CONTAINER ==================== */
00055| 
00056| .app-container {
00057|     display: flex;
00058|     min-height: 100vh;
00059|     position: relative;
00060|     z-index: 1;
00061| }
00062| 
00063| /* ==================== PARTICLE CANVAS ==================== */
00064| 
00065| #particle-canvas {
00066|     position: fixed;
00067|     top: 0;
00068|     left: 0;
00069|     width: 100%;
00070|     height: 100%;
00071|     pointer-events: none;
00072|     z-index: 0;
00073|     overflow: hidden;
00074| }
00075| 
00076| /* ==================== SIDEBAR ==================== */
00077| 
00078| .sidebar {
00079|     width: 250px;
00080|     background: #1a1f3a;
00081|     padding: 30px 20px;
00082|     display: flex;
00083|     flex-direction: column;
00084|     position: fixed;
00085|     height: 100vh;
00086|     border-right: 1px solid var(--border-color);
00087| }
00088| 
00089| .logo {
00090|     margin-bottom: 50px;
00091| }
00092| 
00093| .logo h1 {
00094|     font-size: 1.5em;
00095|     font-weight: 600;
00096|     letter-spacing: 2px;
00097|     color: var(--text-primary);
00098| }
00099| 
00100| .beta-badge {
00101|     display: inline-block;
00102|     background: var(--accent-pink);
00103|     color: white;
00104|     font-size: 0.7em;
00105|     padding: 3px 8px;
00106|     border-radius: 4px;
00107|     margin-left: 10px;
00108|     font-weight: bold;
00109| }
00110| 
00111| .nav-menu {
00112|     display: flex;
00113|     flex-direction: column;
00114|     gap: 5px;
00115| }
00116| 
00117| .nav-item {
00118|     display: flex;
00119|     align-items: center;
00120|     gap: 15px;
00121|     padding: 15px 20px;
00122|     color: var(--text-secondary);
00123|     text-decoration: none;
00124|     border-radius: 8px;
00125|     transition: all 0.3s ease;
00126|     font-size: 0.95em;
00127| }
00128| 
00129| .nav-item:hover {
00130|     background: var(--bg-secondary);
00131|     color: var(--text-primary);
00132| }
00133| 
00134| .nav-item.active {
00135|     background: var(--bg-secondary);
00136|     color: var(--text-primary);
00137|     border-left: 4px solid var(--accent-teal);
00138| }
00139| 
00140| .nav-item .icon {
00141|     font-size: 1.2em;
00142| }
00143| 
00144| /* ==================== THEME SWITCHER ==================== */
00145| 
00146| .theme-section {
00147|     margin-top: auto;
00148|     padding: 20px 15px;
00149|     border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
00150| }
00151| 
00152| .theme-label {
00153|     font-size: 0.7em;
00154|     font-weight: 600;
00155|     color: var(--text-secondary);
00156|     letter-spacing: 2px;
00157|     margin-bottom: 15px;
00158|     text-align: center;
00159| }
00160| 
00161| .theme-options {
00162|     display: flex;
00163|     flex-wrap: wrap;
00164|     gap: 8px;
00165|     justify-content: center;
00166| }
00167| 
00168| .theme-btn {
00169|     width: 36px;
00170|     height: 36px;
00171|     border-radius: 50%;
00172|     border: 2px solid transparent;
00173|     background: var(--bg-secondary);
00174|     cursor: pointer;
00175|     padding: 3px;
00176|     transition: all 0.3s ease;
00177|     display: flex;
00178|     align-items: center;
00179|     justify-content: center;
00180| }
00181| 
00182| .theme-btn:hover {
00183|     transform: scale(1.15);
00184|     box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
00185| }
00186| 
00187| .theme-btn.active {
00188|     border-color: var(--accent-teal);
00189|     box-shadow: 0 0 15px var(--accent-teal);
00190| }
00191| 
00192| .theme-preview {
00193|     display: block;
00194|     width: 100%;
00195|     height: 100%;
00196|     border-radius: 50%;
00197|     border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
00198| }
00199| 
00200| .theme-preview.dark {
00201|     background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a2332 25%, #2a3f5f 25%, #2a3f5f 50%, #4ecdc4 50%, #4ecdc4 75%, #ff6b9d 75%);
00202| }
00203| 
00204| .theme-preview.japan {
00205|     background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fef6e4 25%, #f3d2c1 25%, #f3d2c1 50%, #e84393 50%, #e84393 75%, #d4a574 75%);
00206| }
00207| 
00208| .theme-preview.germany {
00209|     background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2d1f0f 25%, #4a3728 25%, #4a3728 50%, #e67e22 50%, #e67e22 75%, #c0392b 75%);
00210| }
00211| 
00212| .theme-preview.scandinavia {
00213|     background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f8f9fa 25%, #e9ecef 25%, #e9ecef 50%, #4dabf7 50%, #4dabf7 75%, #ffd43b 75%);
00214| }
00215| 
00216| .theme-preview.tropical {
00217|     background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d2618 25%, #1a4d33 25%, #1a4d33 50%, #4dd0e1 50%, #4dd0e1 75%, #69f0ae 75%);
00218| }
00219| 
00220| .theme-preview.nordic {
00221|     background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0a1628 25%, #132744 25%, #132744 50%, #80deea 50%, #80deea 75%, #fff59d 75%);
00222| }
00223| 
00224| /* ==================== MAIN CONTENT ==================== */
00225| 
00226| .main-content {
00227|     flex: 1;
00228|     margin-left: 250px;
00229|     background: var(--bg-primary);
00230|     padding: 30px;
00231| }
00232| 
00233| /* ==================== HEADER ==================== */
00234| 
00235| .header {
00236|     display: flex;
00237|     justify-content: space-between;
00238|     align-items: center;
00239|     margin-bottom: 30px;
00240| }
00241| 
00242| .header h2 {
00243|     font-size: 2em;
00244|     font-weight: 400;
00245|     color: var(--text-primary);
00246| }
00247| 
00248| .header-right {
00249|     display: flex;
00250|     align-items: center;
00251|     gap: 30px;
00252| }
00253| 
00254| .time-filter {
00255|     display: flex;
00256|     gap: 0;
00257|     background: var(--bg-secondary);
00258|     border-radius: 25px;
00259|     padding: 5px;
00260| }
00261| 
00262| .filter-btn {
00263|     padding: 10px 20px;
00264|     background: transparent;
00265|     border: none;
00266|     color: var(--text-secondary);
00267|     font-size: 0.85em;
00268|     font-weight: 600;
00269|     cursor: pointer;
00270|     border-radius: 20px;
00271|     transition: all 0.3s ease;
00272|     position: relative;
00273| }
00274| 
00275| .filter-btn:hover {
00276|     color: var(--text-primary);
00277|     background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
00278|     transform: translateY(-1px);
00279| }
00280| 
00281| .filter-btn.active {
00282|     background: var(--bg-card);
00283|     color: var(--text-primary);
00284|     box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
00285|     transform: scale(1.05);
00286| }
00287| 
00288| .filter-btn:active {
00289|     transform: scale(0.95);
00290| }
00291| 
00292| /* Add loading state for buttons */
00293| .filter-btn.loading {
00294|     opacity: 0.7;
00295|     pointer-events: none;
00296| }
00297| 
00298| .filter-btn.loading::after {
00299|     content: '...';
00300|     margin-left: 5px;
00301|     font-size: 0.8em;
00302| }
00303| 
00304| .date-display {
00305|     color: var(--text-secondary);
00306|     font-size: 0.95em;
00307| }
00308| 
00309| /* ==================== DASHBOARD GRID ==================== */
00310| 
00311| .dashboard-grid {
00312|     display: grid;
00313|     grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
00314|     gap: 25px;
00315| }
00316| 
00317| /* ==================== CARD STYLES ==================== */
00318| 
00319| .card {
00320|     background: var(--bg-card);
00321|     border-radius: 15px;
00322|     padding: 25px;
00323|     box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
00324|     transition: transform 0.3s ease;
00325| }
00326| 
00327| .card:hover {
00328|     transform: translateY(-5px);
00329| }
00330| 
00331| .card-title {
00332|     font-size: 0.85em;
00333|     font-weight: 600;
00334|     color: var(--text-secondary);
00335|     letter-spacing: 1px;
00336|     margin-bottom: 20px;
00337|     text-transform: uppercase;
00338| }
00339| 
00340| /* ==================== COST PREDICTED ==================== */
00341| 
00342| .chart-container {
00343|     position: relative;
00344|     height: 200px;
00345|     display: flex;
00346|     align-items: center;
00347|     justify-content: center;
00348| }
00349| 
00350| .chart-center-text {
00351|     position: absolute;
00352|     text-align: center;
00353|     pointer-events: none;
00354| }
00355| 
00356| .total-label {
00357|     font-size: 0.9em;
00358|     color: var(--text-secondary);
00359| }
00360| 
00361| .total-value {
00362|     font-size: 2em;
00363|     font-weight: bold;
00364|     color: var(--text-primary);
00365|     margin-top: 5px;
00366| }
00367| 
00368| .chart-legend {
00369|     display: flex;
00370|     justify-content: center;
00371|     gap: 30px;
00372|     margin-top: 20px;
00373| }
00374| 
00375| .legend-item {
00376|     display: flex;
00377|     align-items: center;
00378|     gap: 8px;
00379|     font-size: 0.9em;
00380|     color: var(--text-secondary);
00381| }
00382| 
00383| .legend-dot {
00384|     width: 12px;
00385|     height: 12px;
00386|     border-radius: 3px;
00387| }
00388| 
00389| .legend-dot.electricity {
00390|     background: var(--accent-teal);
00391| }
00392| 
00393| .legend-dot.gas {
00394|     background: var(--accent-yellow);
00395| }
00396| 
00397| /* ==================== CHANGE IN COST ==================== */
00398| 
00399| .cost-comparison {
00400|     display: flex;
00401|     align-items: center;
00402|     justify-content: space-between;
00403|     padding: 20px 0;
00404| }
00405| 
00406| .cost-bar-container {
00407|     display: flex;
00408|     gap: 30px;
00409|     flex: 1;
00410| }
00411| 
00412| .cost-bar {
00413|     text-align: center;
00414| }
00415| 
00416| .bar-value {
00417|     font-size: 1.8em;
00418|     font-weight: bold;
00419|     color: var(--accent-teal);
00420|     margin-bottom: 10px;
00421| }
00422| 
00423| .bar-label {
00424|     font-size: 0.85em;

00426| }
00427| 
00428| .cost-change {

00432| 
00433| .change-icon {
00434|     font-size: 2em;

00437| }
00438| 
00439| .change-percentage {
00440|     font-size: 2em;

00445| 
00446| .change-label {
00447|     font-size: 0.75em;

00450| }
00451| 
00452| /* ==================== USAGE ESTIMATE ==================== */
00453| 
00454| .usage-stats {
00455|     display: flex;
00456|     justify-content: space-between;
00457|     margin-bottom: 20px;
00458| }
00459| 
00460| .stat-item {
00461|     display: flex;
00462|     flex-direction: column;
00463|     gap: 5px;
00464| }
00465| 
00466| .stat-label {
00467|     font-size: 0.85em;
00468|     color: var(--text-secondary);
00469| }
00470| 
00471| .stat-value {
00472|     font-size: 1.1em;
00473|     font-weight: bold;
00474|     color: var(--text-primary);
00475| }
00476| 
00477| /* ==================== ACTIVE APPLIANCES ==================== */
00478| 
00479| .appliances-list {
00480|     display: flex;
00481|     flex-direction: column;
00482|     gap: 15px;
00483| }
00484| 
00485| .appliance-item {
00486|     display: flex;
00487|     justify-content: space-between;
00488|     align-items: center;
00489|     padding: 12px 0;
00490|     border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
00491| }
00492| 
00493| .appliance-name {
00494|     display: flex;
00495|     align-items: center;
00496|     gap: 10px;
00497|     color: var(--text-primary);
00498| }
00499| 
00500| .appliance-bar {
00501|     width: 120px;
00502|     height: 8px;
00503|     background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
00504|     border-radius: 4px;
00505|     overflow: hidden;
00506|     margin-right: 10px;
00507| }
00508| 
00509| .appliance-bar-fill {
00510|     height: 100%;
00511|     border-radius: 4px;
00512|     transition: width 0.3s ease;
00513| }
00514| 
00515| .appliance-value {
00516|     font-weight: 600;
00517|     color: var(--text-primary);
00518|     min-width: 60px;
00519|     text-align: right;
00520| }
00521| 
00522| /* ==================== AQI SECTION ==================== */
00523| 
00524| .aqi-status {
00525|     display: flex;
00526|     justify-content: space-around;
00527|     margin-top: 20px;
00528|     padding-top: 15px;
00529|     border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);

00531| 
00532| .aqi-location {

00534|     color: var(--text-secondary);
00535| }
00536| 
00537| .aqi-location span {
00538|     font-weight: bold;
00539|     color: var(--accent-teal);
00540| }
00541| 
00542| /* ==================== SMART SAVINGS MONITOR ==================== */
00543| 
00544| .savings-summary {
00545|     margin-bottom: 20px;
00546| }
00547| 
00548| .savings-row {
00549|     display: flex;
00550|     justify-content: space-between;
00551|     align-items: center;
00552|     margin-bottom: 20px;
00553| }
00554| 
00555| .savings-item {
00556|     flex: 1;
00557|     text-align: center;
00558|     padding: 15px;
00559|     border-radius: 10px;
00560|     background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
00561| }
00562| 
00563| .savings-item.waste {
00564|     border: 2px solid var(--accent-red);
00565|     background: rgba(255, 71, 87, 0.1);
00566| }
00567| 
00568| .savings-item.saved {
00569|     border: 2px solid var(--accent-green);
00570|     background: rgba(6, 255, 165, 0.1);
00571| }
00572| 
00573| .savings-label {
00574|     font-size: 0.85em;
00575|     color: var(--text-secondary);
00576|     margin-bottom: 5px;
00577| }
00578| 
00579| .savings-amount {

00583| }
00584| 
00585| .savings-item.waste .savings-amount {
00586|     color: var(--accent-red);
00587| }
00588| 
00589| .savings-item.saved .savings-amount {
00590|     color: var(--accent-green);
00591| }
00592| 
00593| .savings-desc {
00594|     font-size: 0.75em;
00595|     color: var(--text-secondary);
00596| }
00597| 
00598| .savings-divider {
00599|     width: 2px;
00600|     height: 60px;
00601|     background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
00602|     margin: 0 15px;
00603| }
00604| 
00605| .net-savings {
00606|     text-align: center;
00607|     padding: 15px;
00608|     background: var(--bg-secondary);
00609|     border-radius: 10px;
00610|     margin-top: 10px;
00611| }
00612| 
00613| .net-label {
00614|     font-size: 0.85em;
00615|     color: var(--text-secondary);
00616|     margin-bottom: 5px;
00617| }
00618| 
00619| .net-amount {

00623|     margin-bottom: 5px;

00625| 
00626| .net-percentage {

00631| 
00632| /* Make sure savings elements are visible */
00633| .savings-amount, .net-amount, .net-percentage {
00634|     display: block !important;

00636| }
00637| 
00638| /* Debug styles */
00639| #savingsChart {
00640|     display: block !important;
00641|     visibility: visible !important;
00642|     height: 200px !important;
00643| }
00644| 
00645| .device-savings-list {
00646|     margin-top: 20px;
00647|     max-height: 200px;
00648|     overflow-y: auto;
00649| }
00650| 
00651| .device-savings-item {
00652|     display: flex;
00653|     justify-content: space-between;
00654|     align-items: center;
00655|     padding: 12px;
00656|     margin-bottom: 8px;

00662| .device-info {

00666| .device-name {

00672|

00677|

00681| }
00682| 
00683| .saved-power {
00684|     color: var(--accent-green);
00685| }
00686| 
00687| .device-savings {
00688|     font-size: 0.95em;
00689|     font-weight: bold;
00690|     min-width: 60px;
00691|     text-align: right;

00693|

00696| }
00697| 
00698| .device-savings.negative {
00699|     color: var(--accent-red);
00700| }
00701| 
00702| .no-devices {
00703|     text-align: center;
00704|     color: var(--text-secondary);
00705|     font-size: 0.85em;
00706|     padding: 20px;
00707| }
00708| 
00709| /* ==================== CARBON FOOTPRINT ==================== */
00710| 
00711| .emission-data {
00712|     margin-bottom: 25px;
00713| }
00714| 
00715| .emission-row {
00716|     display: flex;
00717|     justify-content: space-between;
00718|     padding: 10px 0;
00719|     font-size: 0.9em;
00720| }
00721| 
00722| .emission-label {
00723|     color: var(--text-secondary);
00724|     font-weight: 600;
00725| }
00726| 
00727| .emission-value {
00728|     color: var(--text-primary);
00729| }
00730| 
00731| .emission-value.predicted {
00732|     color: var(--text-secondary);
00733| }
00734| 
00735| .emission-row.highlight {
00736|     border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
00737|     border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
00738|     margin: 10px 0;
00739|     padding: 15px 0;
00740| }
00741|
